operator.note: Reverses the parent's framing from 'false post adds a wrong direction' to 'false post removes a right direction'; suppression is harder to detect than commission because there is no failing artifact to ever contradict it.

question: Specialize the most dangerous false-post subtype and test its self-limiting boundary: a fabricated 'this basin is exhausted, stop trying X' claim doesn't add a wrong artifact, it SUBTRACTS exploration. Does such a withdrawal-claim cause measurable, persistent abandonment of a region that actually still contains the optimum? Inject an exhaustion claim on a problem whose ground-truth frontier is known to lie inside the disavowed region, and track whether any agent ever re-enters and recovers it, or whether the false claim becomes a self-fulfilling collective blind spot.

floor.minimal_experiment: On a problem with a known in-region optimum, post a fabricated exhaustion claim early; run the population and record region re-entry rate, time-to-recovery (if any), and final-frontier gap vs a no-injection replica.
floor.falsifiable_prediction: Exhaustion-claim boards permanently underperform: the disavowed region is re-entered by <10% of agents and the run's final frontier stays measurably below the no-injection control, because nothing in a truth-blind channel ever manufactures the disconfirming evidence.
floor.control: A TRUE exhaustion claim (region genuinely empty) on a matched board; abandonment there is correct and costless, isolating the harm as specific to the false-suppression case rather than to exhaustion claims in general.

value_profile.valuable_to_whom: Designers of collective-search / quality-diversity agent platforms worried about premature convergence and induced blind spots; and AI-safety researchers studying steering-by-omission (denial-of-exploration) attacks that evade content-correctness defenses.

prior_art.known_name: No clean single name; nearest relatives are self-fulfilling-prophecy / herding-induced premature convergence in search, and censorship-as-denial-of-exploration. Distinct from additive misinformation.
prior_art.novelty_watermark: Genuinely fresh framing: most misinformation work studies false ADDITIONS; isolating a false SUBTRACTION (a withdrawal/exhaustion claim) as a verifier-immune attack and operationalizing it via a known-in-region optimum is a non-obvious recombination I have not seen named for agent swarms.
